parsed_profile.pov_distance: Third-person omniscient with documentary authority; scholarly register alternates with experiential testimony; investigative first person frames authorial discovery process
parsed_profile.sentence_rhythm: Citation-heavy declarative passages alternate with kinetic dialogue reconstruction; short testimonial statements contrasted with complex contextual subordinate clauses
parsed_profile.paragraphing: Discrete endnote entries function as paragraphs in scholarly sections; block dialogue with attribution tags in scene passages; character entries use compact single-paragraph format
parsed_profile.dialogue_method: Direct quotation from primary sources anchors historical claims; fictionalized exchanges labeled with documentary sources; no dialogue in front matter sections
parsed_profile.description_method: Sensory specificity deployed in testimony passages only; atmospheric detail subordinated to evidentiary purpose; character descriptions emphasize single distinguishing trait per entry
parsed_profile.exposition_method: Inline citations serve dual attribution and worldbuilding function; no separate information dumps; thesis delivered through direct assertion qualified by literary epigraph
parsed_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter titles provide thematic framing; quoted statements plunge into specific documented exchanges; personal discovery narrative and rhetorical questions create intrigue
parsed_profile.transition_method: Thematic parallels (scientific investigation/atrocity investigation) provide connective tissue; physical location shifts handled through returning residents; physical location shifts through chronological progression
do_not_copy: Specific proper nouns including historical figures, locations, and archival references
Proprietary citation formats and bibliographic entries
Copyrighted image credits and Getty identifiers
Quote length and citation density in fictional reconstructions

reader_promise: An evidentiary historical exploration through intersecting biographical narratives of celebrity, political, and cultural figures, presented with documentary authority while maintaining interpretive openness; visual corroboration through photo documentation; moral complexity without prescriptive judgment on collaboration and resistance
core_engine: Documentary-historical testimonial engine with scholarly citation apparatus as primary narrative structure; archival integration providing evidentiary closure while maintaining interpretive openness; intersecting biographical threads converging on single location function as closure mechanism
state_variables: {'temporal_phase': 'Occupation timeline → Liberation phases → Post-war reckoning', 'documentary_layer': 'Primary source testimony → Secondary interpretation → Scholarly apparatus', 'biographical_alignment': 'Intersecting aristocratic, political, cultural, military, civilian spheres', 'evidentiary_mode': 'Vignette documentation → Investigation → Retrospective reinterpretation → Bibliographic closure', 'location_convergence': 'Hotel as microcosm stage for historical reckoning'}
reader_rewards: Hotel as narrative/structural device demonstrating social microcosm function
Understanding of collaboration-resistance as coexisting moral spectrum
Demonstration of how social capital overrides legal justice in extraordinary times
Visual corroboration through captioned photo documentation spanning liberation timeline
Evidentiary authenticity through endnote apparatus and source trail
Atmospheric establishment through sensory and social details
Epistemic distance calibration between documentary authority and experiential testimony
reusable_mechanisms: Testimonial frame—firsthand accounts quoted for experiential immediacy
Retrospective reinterpretation—earlier events recontextualized by new documentary evidence
Parallel structure—investigation mirroring investigation provides thematic counterpoint
Fictional intermediary—real historical figures processed through interpretive proxy scenes
Intersecting biographical threads converging on single location
Endnote cross-referencing system linking claims to sources
Photo caption as historical witness providing visual corroboration
Date-stamped visual anchors for temporal grounding
Juxtaposition across social spheres (military, civilian, cultural) in liberation documentation
Location-convergence finale for retrospective moral accounting
Bibliographic apparatus providing source trail and scholarly credibility
Anchoring narrative scope to single geographic location
Using hospitality spaces as stages for political/economic negotiation
Interweaving celebrity figures with historical events for reader accessibility
Character lists as chapter preview mechanism
Establishing authorial discovery process to frame historical investigation
non_reusable_specifics: Hotel name and Place Vendome location
All character names including Hemingway, Chanel, Goering, Dietrich
Specific WWII events, dates, and chapter ranges
Copyrighted image credits and Getty identifiers
Proprietary citation formats and bibliographic entries
risk_patterns: Nonfiction with fictionalized dialogue passages creates authenticity risk
Testimonial claims from memory present verification challenges
Source material primarily bibliographic apparatus rather than narrative content
No character arcs or plot progression in documentary sections
Academic apparatus functions as closure but lacks emotional engagement mechanics
Citation-heavy format may impede reader momentum
Celebrity historical figures may overshadow documented historical events
Authorial first-person framing may introduce subjectivity bias
Historical nonfiction may contain verification gaps in character anecdotes
Collaborator sympathetic portrayal risks reader moral confusion
Character list format may create false expectations of novelistic treatment
